name: Matter.js
description: 2D rigid body physics engine — gravity, collisions, constraints and composites. Enables falling letters, bouncing hero elements, gravity-pulled cards, collision confetti.
head: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/matter-js@0.19.0/build/matter.min.js"></script>
body:
<script>
(function() {
  var Engine   = Matter.Engine;
  var Render   = Matter.Render;
  var Runner   = Matter.Runner;
  var Bodies   = Matter.Bodies;
  var Composite = Matter.Composite;

  var container = document.querySelector('.physics-canvas-container');
  if (!container) return;

  var engine = Engine.create();
  var render = Render.create({
    element: container,
    engine: engine,
    options: {
      width: container.offsetWidth,
      height: 300,
      wireframes: false,
      background: 'transparent'
    }
  });

  // Add bouncing balls
  var balls = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
    balls.push(Bodies.circle(Math.random() * container.offsetWidth, -50 - i * 60, 18, {
      restitution: 0.7,
      render: { fillStyle: i % 2 === 0 ? '#5b4dff' : '#2dd4bf' }
    }));
  }
  var ground = Bodies.rectangle(container.offsetWidth / 2, 310, container.offsetWidth, 20, { isStatic: true, render: { fillStyle: 'transparent' } });
  Composite.add(engine.world, balls.concat([ground]));
  Render.run(render);
  Runner.run(Runner.create(), engine);
})();
</script>
